title: Bridget Carleton Selected First in WNBA Expansion Draft by Fire, Surprising Many in League Circles
body:
The Portland Fire has kicked off its new chapter in the WNBA with a bang, selecting unrestricted free agent Bridget Carleton as the number one overall pick in the 2026 WNBA expansion draft. This highly anticipated move marks the beginning of a new era for the team, and sets the stage for a competitive debut season.

Carleton, a talented and experienced forward, brings a wealth of skill and knowledge to the Fire's roster. With a proven track record in the league, she is poised to be a key contributor to the team's success. Her selection by the Fire was no surprise, as they reportedly targeted her early in the draft process. A source close to the team revealed that Carleton was always at the top of their wish list, demonstrating the Fire's commitment to building a strong foundation for their inaugural season.

The WNBA expansion draft has added a new layer of excitement to the league, as existing teams look to bolster their rosters with talented players from other franchises. For the Fire, selecting Carleton was a strategic move that addresses a pressing need for a skilled forward. Her ability to score, rebound, and pass makes her an invaluable asset to the team, and her experience will undoubtedly help guide younger players on the roster.

Carleton's arrival in Portland marks a significant moment for the Fire, who are eager to establish themselves as a competitive force in the league. With her on board, the team is well-positioned to take on the likes of perennial powerhouses like the Seattle Storm and the Minnesota Lynx. While the Fire still have a lot of work to do in terms of building their roster, Carleton's selection is a crucial step in the right direction.

The selection of Carleton also highlights the importance of experience in the WNBA. With many younger players still developing their skills, the presence of veterans like Carleton can provide a much-needed boost to team chemistry and performance. Her ability to mentor and guide her teammates will be invaluable in the Fire's quest to build a winning culture.

As the Fire look to the future, Carleton's selection sets the stage for an exciting season. With a talented core of players and a strong foundation in place, the team is well-positioned to make a splash in the league. As the season gets underway, fans will be eager to see how Carleton and the Fire perform, and whether they can live up to the hype surrounding their inaugural season. With Carleton on board, the possibilities are endless, and the road to success is looking bright for the Portland Fire.
